chunks.text: Christopher Brooks Skip to main content Skip to sidebar Christopher Brooks As of June 28, 2018, I no longer work for UC Berkeley and am retired. I was the executive director of the TerraSwarm Research Center , (2013-2018), which was addressing the

Center , (2013-2018), which was addressing the huge potential (and associated risks) of pervasive integration of smart, networked sensors and actuators into our connected world. I was the Ptolemy Project Software Manager, 1993? - 2018 I

Ptolemy Project Software Manager, 1993? - 2018 I was the Executive Director of the Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems Center . I was the Executive Director of the Center for Hybrid and Embedded Software Systems (CHESS) How do I reserve a DOP Center R

h Java #7 with autoconf Ohloh is an open source directory. I have lots of experience because Ptolemy Classic was in SCCS, then RCS, then CVS and the first commit dates from 1989. Non-work projects Black Rock Dead (2025): For a long time, interesting
